description: Perform the final documentation-only cleanup of the Miss Lana project canon after brand/domain/contact synchronization. Fix only the remaining verified inconsistencies between root operational documents and core canon: product description in CLAUDE.md, active app location and launch-state wording in STATUS.md, form implementation status and review placement in 03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md, and next-step status in README.md. Do not perform duplicate-file cleanup: the operator confirmed BRAND.md exists only once in the project.

primary_authorities: Current operator correction: BRAND.md exists only once in the project; previous duplicate warning was false and must not be acted upon.
current_truth: The project is a marketing and lead-generation website for a travelling children's theatre in Los Angeles, not an interactive browser theatre experience.
The active Next.js application lives at repository root: app/, components/, lib/, public/, tests/.
baselines/js-next/ is historical only and must not be described as the current active app location.
The production domain is live at misslanatheatre.com, but public launch is still pre-launch/noindex.
The inquiry form UI already exists with client-side validation and on-screen success state.
Production delivery of form submissions to info@misslanatheatre.com must be described as unverified/not yet connected unless separately proven.
Verified reviews/testimonials are a launch dependency, not out of scope.
The current next phase is pre-launch/launch work: form delivery verification, real media, reviews, redirects, GBP/Search Console, technical QA, noindex removal, and launch.
The locked brand remains Miss Lana's Fairy-Tale Theatre; primary domain misslanatheatre.com; primary email info@misslanatheatre.com; primary phone (323) 903-2039.
No duplicate-file cleanup is authorized or required by this task.
precedence_rules: Current operator correction overrides any prior audit claim about duplicate BRAND.md files.
BRAND.md remains authoritative for brand/domain/contact naming.
STATUS.md must describe present repository and launch state only; history belongs in PROJECT_PROGRESS.md.
README.md must reflect current state and next steps, not completed earlier phases.
03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md must distinguish implemented UI from unverified production delivery.
Do not change business facts, pricing, routes, brand spelling, or design-system decisions in this task.
allowed_change_classes: Final audit report and reviewer-grade closure artifact
forbidden_change_classes: Deleting or archiving project files based on presumed duplicates
DNS, redirect, email, hosting, GBP, Search Console, analytics, or deployment changes

prerequisites.blocking_condition: If the repository paths differ from those documented here, inspect the actual tree and update only the equivalent canonical files. Do not infer or delete duplicates.

in_scope: Rewrite CLAUDE.md product reality so it clearly describes a marketing/lead-generation website for a travelling children's theatre.
Add an explicit negative statement that the product is not an interactive browser performance, game, streaming product, ticketing platform, or virtual theatre experience.
Correct STATUS.md so the active app location is repository root and baselines/js-next is historical only.
Split STATUS.md state wording into deployment status and launch status: production domain live; public launch pre-launch/noindex.
Correct 03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md to state that the inquiry-form UI is implemented, while production submission delivery remains unverified/not connected unless separately proven.
Move verified reviews/testimonials out of the 'out of scope' section and into a launch dependencies section.
Update README.md so completed Phase 1-3 page work is not described as future work.
Update README.md next steps to current Phase 5/pre-launch work.
Ensure all edited files remain consistent with Theatre spelling, canonical domain, canonical email, canonical phone, /school-shows, and @phosphor-icons/react.
Append a short factual entry to docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md describing the documentation final cleanup.
Create a final verification report and reviewer-grade review artifact.
out_of_scope: Any duplicate-file scan, deletion, archival, or Project knowledge cleanup.
Form backend implementation or email delivery setup.
Redirect, DNS, hosting, Search Console, GBP, or noindex implementation.
Changing pricing, show titles, travel rules, cancellation policy, insurance, or public-school strategy.

non_goals: Do not delete any BRAND.md or other canon file as a duplicate.
Do not alter code, runtime behavior, routes, or deployment configuration.
Do not claim form delivery is working unless independently verified.
Do not claim the site is publicly launched while noindex remains active.
Do not invent reviews, permissions, ratings, or clients.
Do not rewrite completed historical progress entries.
forbidden_execution_patterns: No duplicate cleanup based on search-result history or uploaded-file history.
No broad global replacement across the repository.
No mixing present-state wording with historical build-location wording.
No describing reviews as both launch-required and out-of-scope.
No describing the inquiry form as absent when the UI already exists.
No describing a live deployment as a completed public launch while noindex is active.
No completion claim without cross-document contradiction scan and full diff review.
execution_guardrails: Inspect git status before editing and touch only files listed in scope.
Use precise status vocabulary: Deployment = LIVE; Launch = PRE-LAUNCH / NOINDEX.
Use precise form vocabulary: UI implemented; production delivery unverified/not connected.
Keep README current-state summary concise and aligned with STATUS.md.
Do not change any locked brand/domain/contact facts.
After editing, search for the obsolete phrases 'interactive fairy-tale theatre', 'baselines/js-next/ (единственное Next.js-приложение', 'её сейчас нет', and outdated README future-phase wording.

steps.title: Pre-edit current-state matrix
actions: Record current wording in CLAUDE.md, STATUS.md, README.md, and docs/core/03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md.
Confirm BRAND.md exists once in the repository and record that no duplicate cleanup will be performed.
List exact contradictions to be corrected and no others.
steps.expected_outcome: A bounded correction matrix with no duplicate-file action.

steps.title: Correct CLAUDE.md product reality
actions: Replace the browser-interactive-theatre description with the marketing/lead-generation website description.
Add a clear what-it-is-not statement covering interactive browser experience, game, streaming, and ticketing.
steps.expected_outcome: Operational agents receive the correct product model.

steps.title: Correct STATUS.md current state
actions: Set active app location to repository root paths.
Mark baselines/js-next as historical only.
Separate deployment status from launch status.
Keep historical build notes unchanged in the append-only/history sections.
steps.expected_outcome: STATUS.md accurately describes the present repository and pre-launch state.

steps.title: Correct sitemap/scope implementation status
actions: Replace wording that says the inquiry form does not exist.
State that the UI, validation, and on-screen confirmation exist.
State that production delivery to info@misslanatheatre.com remains launch-critical and unverified unless proven.
Move verified reviews/testimonials into a Launch dependencies section.
steps.expected_outcome: Scope distinguishes implemented interface from missing production integration and treats reviews consistently.

steps.title: Update README current status and next steps
actions: Remove language saying Home and service pages are future work.
State that MVP pages and final copy are already assembled.
List Phase 5/pre-launch priorities: form delivery, real media, verified reviews, redirects, GBP/Search Console, QA, noindex removal, launch.
steps.expected_outcome: README matches STATUS.md and no longer sends agents backward to completed phases.

steps.title: Progress log and verification
actions: Append a concise 2026-06-25 entry to docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md.
Run targeted residue and contradiction searches.
Review the complete diff with BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/NOTE severity labels.
Create the required report and review artifacts.
steps.expected_outcome: All verified inconsistencies are closed and documented.

success_criteria: CLAUDE.md describes the real marketing/lead-generation website and explicitly rejects the browser-interactive product model.
STATUS.md identifies root app paths as active and baselines/js-next as historical.
STATUS.md separates live deployment from pre-launch/noindex state.
03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md states the form UI exists and production delivery is unverified/not connected.
Verified reviews are no longer located under an out-of-scope heading.
README.md reflects completed MVP pages/copy and current Phase 5 work.
No duplicate file was deleted or archived by this task.
No BLOCKER or HIGH finding remains open after review.
docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md has one append-only entry for this task.

required_commands: git diff -- CLAUDE.md STATUS.md README.md docs/core/03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md

rg -n "Interactive fairy-tale theatre|interactive performances in the browser|baselines/js-next.*единственное Next.js|её сейчас нет|реальные страницы.*когда готовы" CLAUDE.md STATUS.md README.md docs/core/03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md
rg -n "Deployment: LIVE|Launch state: PRE-LAUNCH|repository root|production delivery|Launch dependencies|verified reviews" CLAUDE.md STATUS.md README.md docs/core/03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md
rg -n "Miss Lana's Fairy-Tale Theater|misslanatheater.com.*primary|info@misslanatheater.com|/for-preschools|phosphor-react" CLAUDE.md STATUS.md README.md docs/core/03_SITEMAP_AND_SCOPE.md
manual_checks: Confirm the last search returns only semantically valid protective-domain or historical references, if any.
Confirm no duplicate cleanup was performed.
Confirm README and STATUS describe the same current phase.
Confirm the form status is not overstated.
Confirm reviews are launch-required but not claimed as collected.
Confirm PROJECT_PROGRESS was appended, not rewritten.

report_requirements: List each corrected contradiction with before/after summary.
Explicitly record that the prior duplicate-BRAND finding was false and no duplicate cleanup was performed.
List files changed and verification commands/results.
State remaining open owner/launch dependencies without expanding scope.

closure_sequence: Confirm all five scoped files were reviewed and only required files were changed.
Confirm no duplicate file was deleted, archived, renamed, or marked superseded.
Confirm obsolete product, app-location, form-status, review-scope, and README-next-step wording is removed.
Perform reviewer-grade diff review and resolve every BLOCKER/HIGH finding.
Confirm no non_goals were fixed, no forbidden_execution_patterns were violated, and all execution_guardrails were respected.
Confirm report and review artifacts exist and are readable.
Close with status: CANON CLEAN — READY FOR PRE-LAUNCH EXECUTION.
failure_conditions: Any duplicate file is removed or archived.
CLAUDE.md still describes an interactive browser theatre product.
STATUS.md still presents baselines/js-next as the active app.
Form UI is still described as absent.
Reviews remain under an out-of-scope heading.
README still lists completed page-building work as future work.
Any BLOCKER or HIGH review finding remains open.

post_actions: Do not continue into code or deployment work in this task.
Use the cleaned canon as the source for the next pre-launch TUNG.
Next recommended task class: pre-launch audit and execution plan covering form delivery, media, reviews, redirects, GBP/Search Console, technical QA, and noindex removal.
